package rulefixtures

// scenario for go_perf_layer_resource_pooling_db_pool_created_per_repository: Layer: Resource pooling. Flag database pools constructed per repository instance instead of shared process ownership.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: contextual.
type Rule580PositiveRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario580Positive(records []Rule580PositiveRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		for _, value := range record.Values {
			total += len(value) + record.ID
		}
	}
	return total
}
